notes: v0.16.89 — Mini-boss spawn via preloaded script ref (no class_name). v0.16.88's set_script pattern was safe from crash but left the boss as an empty shell — `kind` never propagated, so MiniBoss._draw's match-kind branch produced no output (= 'empty arena' even with z=8 fixing the layering). v0.16.86 with MiniBoss.new() crashed in the PCK because of a class_name registration quirk. v0.16.89 splits the difference: MiniBossScript.new() — direct preloaded GDScript reference, no class_name lookup needed, script chain attached at construction so var initializers + _ready fire. Defensive null-check fallback to the old pattern if new() returns null. All v0.16.87/88 force-init preserved. Diag strip stays one more release. Windows only.
